title_localized.text: Wireless charger with foreign object detection

abstract_localized.text: A wireless power transmitter detects a metal object on the charging surface using quality-factor measurement and suspends inductive charging.

title_localized.text: Wireless charger with foreign object detection

abstract_localized.text: A wireless power transmitter detects a metal object on the charging surface.

title_localized.text: Adaptive coil alignment for wireless power transfer

abstract_localized.text: Coil alignment is adjusted adaptively. Foreign object detection interrupts power delivery when FOD thresholds are exceeded.

title_localized.text: Thermal management for an inductive charging pad

abstract_localized.text: A heat spreader cools the coil assembly of an inductive charging pad during high-power operation.

title_localized.text: Foreign object detection in resonant wireless power systems

abstract_localized.text: FOD based on coupled-mode observation in a resonant wireless power link.
